# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Creates a pytest.ini file to set log_file=/tmp/pytest.log, ensuring pytest writes logs to a writable location.

## Suggested Diff (apply manually if needed)

```diff
--- /dev/null
+++ b/pytest.ini
@@ ... @@
[pytest]
log_file = /tmp/pytest.log
```
